_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Dashboard Cancel Buttons (Batch + Work Item)

steps.description: Rewrite POST /api/item/{id}/cancel and POST /api/batch/{id}/cancel to delegate to orch.cancel.* with reason / to_draft / reset_items form params; extend the confirm-dialog GET endpoint to deliver a form-bearing modal for cancel actions; update _ACTION_LABELS copy. Anchor RED tests added under tests/dashboard/.
Review S01: endpoint contracts, form parsing, exception mapping (LookupError→404, ValueError→422/409), service-layer delegation (no enum manipulation in router), anchor TDD evidence.

Extend components/confirm_dialog.html with optional form_html slot; create fragments/confirm_action_form.html; expand cancel button visibility in batch_detail_header.html for all cancellable batch statuses; add cancel + disabled-with-hint state to item_detail.html; add per-row quick-cancel to batches.html with native confirm(); run make css; update dashboard/CLAUDE.md.

Review S03: visibility rules mirror service-layer constants (Invariants 2 & 3), confirm_dialog macro byte-equivalence for existing call sites, Tailwind classes present in styles.css after make css, no layer violations in templates.

Expand dashboard test coverage to every AC, Boundary Behavior row, and Invariant. Files: test_actions_cancel_batch.py, test_actions_cancel_item.py, test_cancel_confirm_dialog.py, test_cancel_button_visibility.py. Report includes a coverage matrix.
Cross-agent review of S01+S03+S05: API↔Frontend contract, service-layer integration, AC/Invariant/Boundary coverage matrix complete.
QV: Browser verification — exercise the cancel buttons + modals against the worktree e2e stack via playwright-cli (V1..V7 maps to AC1..AC6 plus regression checks).
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill.
